steps.title: Keep the phrase essential
steps.content: The sentence means barter economies avoid currency in favor of direct trade. The phrase "in favor of a direct trade system" is essential to the object of "eschew."

steps.title: Avoid unnecessary breaks
steps.content: A and C use commas that incorrectly set off essential wording, and D uses a dash for wording that should remain integrated. No punctuation lets "that requires" attach clearly to "system." The relative clause then identifies the direct trade system that requires the double coincidence of wants. The answer is B.
